title: Business Immigration Attorney | Florida Business Immigration Law Firm
content:
## Employment-Based & Business Immigration Lawyers
Looking to work in the U.S. or hire global talent? With many employment-based visa options available, choosing the right one is key. At Colombo & Hurd, we provide prompt, precise immigration services tailored to both individuals and employers. Our experienced immigration attorneys use advanced technology to ensure every petition is accurate and timely. Whether you’re pursuing new opportunities or building your team, we’re here to guide you every step of the way.

### Permanent Residence (Green Card) Visas
- EB-1A Visa For individuals with extraordinary ability in science, art, education, business, or athletics
For individuals with extraordinary ability in science, art, education, business, or athletics
- EB-2 NIW Visa For advanced degree professionals whose work benefits U.S. national interest
For advanced degree professionals whose work benefits U.S. national interest
- O-1 Visas For individuals with extraordinary ability in sciences, arts, education, business, or entertainment
For individuals with extraordinary ability in sciences, arts, education, business, or entertainment
- L-1 Visas (L-1A & L-1B) For intracompany transferees in managerial or specialized knowledge roles
For intracompany transferees in managerial or specialized knowledge roles

## Why Choose Colombo & Hurd’s Employment-Based & Business Immigration Lawyers

### Proven Experience with Expertise of a Former USCIS Officer
Our team of U.S.-licensed attorneys from top law schools has helped thousands achieve their immigration goals. With a former 13-year U.S. immigration officer on our team, we bring invaluable expertise to your case.

### Strategic, Data-Driven Guidance
We create a strategy based on your background, career goals, and evolving immigration policies. By leveraging comprehensive USCIS data and staying current on trends, we maximize your chances of success with a customized approach.

### Exclusive Technology Platform
Our proprietary case management system keeps your case moving efficiently, providing clear updates and next steps—giving you confidence and control throughout your journey.

### Global Reach, Local Support
With over 450 team members across the U.S., Latin America, and around the globe, we serve professionals worldwide with personalized guidance that feels close to home—wherever you are.

### Reputation for Excellence
With an AV rating from Martindale-Hubbell—the highest rating awarded based on peer reviews from other attorneys—and an A+ BBB rating, we’re recognized for our excellence and client-focused service.

## Your Success is our Success Helping Thousands Achieve Their American Dream

### EB-1A Case Study: Public Health Innovator From Zimbabwe Approval
In 2008, in a resource-limited district of Zimbabwe, one physician stood alone as the sole doctor for more than 140,000 people. At that time, just 15 patients were receiving life-saving HIV treatment, despite hundreds of others in need of care. Faced with overwhelming need and scarce resources, our client designed an outreach model that delivered care directly to remote villages. What began as a local solution grew into a national system and eventually influenced global policy, illustrating exactly what the Employment-Based First Preference Extraordinary Ability (EB-1A) classification is meant to recognize.
Our client’s journey, rooted in rural clinics but reaching into international health systems, shows how extraordinary ability is defined both by accolades and by innovations that transform lives. It also highlights why the EB-1A pathway is essential for immigrant leaders who bring expertise to strengthen American healthcare.
With this foundation, Mr. Jason Qiu, Colombo & Hurd Immigration Attorney , successfully secured approval of this EB-1A Petition on August 20, 2025. This approved EB-1A Petition validated years of innovation and opened the door for our client to expand his vision in the United States.

### The best decision of 2024 for my family and me
The best decision of 2024 for my family and me was choosing Colombo & Hurd. Professionalism, expertise, responsibility, and results. 100% recommended.

### I enjoyed working with Colombo & Hurd in my successful EB-1A case

I truly was in good hands and definitely couldn’t see myself walking and succeeding in this path without their amazing guidance!
